name: Swift Dzire
description: India's most popular sedan, perfect for city rides and short outstation trips. Comfortable, fuel-efficient, and reliable.
bestFor: Local rides, airport transfers, short outstation trips

name: Toyota Etios
description: Toyota's reliable sedan known for its spacious cabin and excellent fuel economy. Ideal for comfortable long-distance travel.
bestFor: Outstation trips, corporate travel, long drives

name: Honda Amaze
description: Honda's stylish sedan offering premium comfort with smooth ride quality. Great for both city and highway driving.

name: Maruti Ertiga
description: India's favourite MPV with spacious 7-seater capacity. Perfect for family trips and group travel across Jharkhand.

name: Toyota Innova
description: The king of road trips. Toyota Innova offers unmatched comfort, space, and reliability for long-distance travel.

name: Innova Crysta
description: The premium avatar of Innova with luxury interiors, captain seats, and superior ride quality. Perfect for VIP and corporate travel.

name: Mahindra Scorpio
description: Rugged and powerful SUV built for Indian roads. Perfect for hilly terrains of Jharkhand and adventure travel.
bestFor: Hill station trips, rough terrain, adventure travel

name: Toyota Fortuner
description: India's most iconic luxury SUV. Commands presence on the road with powerful performance and premium comfort.
bestFor: Weddings, VIP travel, luxury outstation trips

name: Tempo Traveller (12 Seater)
description: Perfect for large group travel. Spacious tempo traveller with pushback seats, AC, and entertainment system.

name: Tempo Traveller (17 Seater)
description: Our largest vehicle for big groups. Ideal for weddings, corporate retreats, and large family pilgrimages.
bestFor: Large group tours, weddings, corporate retreats
